results.title: The Man I Love earns over 7-minute ovation at Cannes as Rami Malek moved to tears at premiere
results.description: The Man I Love received a thunderous standing ovation lasting more than seven minutes at its premiere in the main competition at the 79th Cannes Film Festival, with director Ira Sachs joined by cast members Rami Malek, Tom Sturridge and Luther Ford for the gala screening. Set in 1984 New York, the film follows Jimmy [...] The post The Man I Love earns over 7-minute ovation at Cannes as Rami Malek moved to tears at premiere appeared first on ANC .
